message:
fix: detect CLI agents in approval dialog via kc-agent health endpoint (#3283)

The approval dialog showed "No CLI agents detected" because it relies on
the WebSocket agents list, which is never connected in demo mode. Now
fetches agent availability from kc-agent's HTTP /health endpoint when
opening the dialog, and shows each agent's proper icon (AgentIcon) instead
of a generic terminal icon.

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@ -import { Shield, Terminal, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react' +import { Shield, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react' import { BaseModal } from '../../lib/modals' import type { AgentInfo } from '../../types/agent' +import { AgentIcon } from './AgentIcon' const APPROVED_KEY = 'kc_agents_approved' @@ -76,7 +77,7 @@ export function AgentApprovalDialog({ isOpen, agents, onApprove, onCancel }: Age key={agent.name} className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-secondary/30 border border-border" > - +
{agent.displayName}

{agent.description}
